description: Navigate to Tokyo's Shinjuku district (approximately 35.6938°N, 139.7034°E), enable the 3D Buildings layer to display three-dimensional building models, and adjust the camera to a tilted perspective view showing the skyline. The camera should be tilted between 45-70 degrees from horizontal (not looking straight down). Save a screenshot of this 3D perspective view to ~/Documents/tokyo_skyline_3d.png. The final image should clearly show Tokyo's urban skyline with 3D building models visible, demonstrating depth and building heights from an elevated, angled viewpoint.
